meta_name: MAHA Seed Oil Free Gold Rush

RFK MAHA report targets ultraprocessed foods + seed oils + pesticides. New dietary guidelines Jan 7 2026 recommend less ultraprocessed food. Product: seed oil free snack brand / tallow cooking products / restaurant directory. Content: controversy between MAHA vs mainstream nutrition = engagement farming goldmine.
